raw_text: emilio nieto striano id: 05338797-z birth date: 13-12-1989 birth place: madrid (spain) address: st. fuente del ejido n*4, 28413, el boalo (madrid) mobile: (+34)653214566 e-mail: emilionietostrianoo gmail.com studies undergraduate - university degree: escuela universitaria de ingeniería técnica aeronáutica en la especialidad de aeronavegación in universidad politécnica de madrid (upm), equivalent to aronautical engineering, concentration on navigation systems. read annex (page 2) for a detailed undergraduate information (september 2007-october 2013) post-academic training - presence at a seminar called gestión de la actividad aeroportuaria y la navegación aérea, organized by aeropuertos espaoles y navegación aérea (aena) in the universidad autónoma de madrid (uam) (march 2009). (https: //www.dropbox.com/s/bkzeoivue7bkoa9/conf.pdf?dl=0) - participation in extracurricular seminars and academic lectures cycles specialized on aeronautical themes (safety, security, holding, etc) postgraduate (nowadays) mechanical design postgraduate in which catia v5 is used. it is called máster en diseo mecánico aeronáutico (medma) in the school escuela de diseo mecánico (eddm) (650 hours). if more information is required read annex (page 2) computer skills - strong computer skills in microsoft office software: excel, word, access, porwerpoint, etc. - familiar with different operating systems like microsoft windows, mac os and linux - strong computer skills in catia v5 software - basic skills in matlab software - strong computer skills in adobe photoshop software language skills listening writing english intermediate (b2-c1) advanced (c1) intermediate (b2-c1) intermediate (b2-c1) https://www.dropbox.com/s/e3nj02sulqs6g8d/british. pdf ?dl=0 experience sporadic works as science teacher (maths, science, physics, chemistry etc.) volunteering three months volunteering in united kingdom and finland (february 2014 to april 2014): - two months in huddersfield and aspatria helping in a cafeteria and restoring a watermill -one month in rauma (finland) living with a finnish family and helping them in household chores and gardening other interesting data - team work skills - ability to negotiate and to substantially contribute to groups optimal performance - presentation skills committed to clear and consistent communication of quality content - driving license (since 2010) - availability to travel nationally and internationally page 1 of 2 annex undergraduate additional information - the university title was obtained by the upm (universidad politécnica de madrid) and by upc (universitat politécnica de catalunya) thank to a sicue's exchange (september 2010- march 2011). - the topic of degrees dissertation was diseo de la instalación eléctrica para la alimentación de un nuevo servicio de extinción de incendios en el aeropuerto de matacán (salamanca), a detailed study of electric installation of this airport with proposal for improvements on this electric installation, directed by the professor eduardo lázaro (upm). final mark: 8/10 (academic marks: https://www.dropbox.com/s/3mz2jygtwmdhlma/marks.pdf?d1=0) (university title: https://www.dropbox.com/s/fn4nnys2c5hzbaa/titulo.pdf?dl=0) postgraduate additional information the postgraduate i am studying it is not only a postgraduate in which catia v5 is taught, but it gives you the opportunity to learn to work as airbus designers do. also, this postgraduate makes you learn an efficient work in design, giving the knowledge which only would be acquired with long professional experiences. it can be resumed as: professional catia. aeronautical methodology -advanced concepts -pieces advanced design -assembly advanced design -drawings advanced design -3d documentation -picture drawings documentation product configuration -product structure -plm files management -product state evolution -documental management mechanical design -main concepts of aeronautical mechanic design -advanced concepts of aeronautical mechanic design -corrosion -tolerances -stage direction for manufacturing and assembling. -structure calculus main concepts -aeronautical manuals manufacturing technologies, assembling and processes -manufacturing technologies -assembling technologies -other processes disciplines design introduction -structures design -interior design -equipments and cabins design -fluid systems design -electrical systems design. it was an important part of the postgraduate, and we practiced with real design situations -flight test instrumentation design -tools design for more information about the programme visit http://www.eddm.es/images/web/temariodetallado medma2014-2015.pdf page 2 of 2
